summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Red Team Framework v3.1 with Tactical Decision Engine. Backend APIs working correctly with 96.2% success rate. Frontend displays 14 MITRE tactics correctly but has critical phase selection bug preventing scan initiation.

minor_bugs.issue: Accepts empty target when should return 400 error
minor_bugs.impact: Validation bypass - allows invalid scan creation

critical_bugs.issue: Phase selection onClick handler not working - clicking phase divs doesn't update selectedPhases state
critical_bugs.impact: Prevents scan initiation - ENGAGE button remains disabled
critical_bugs.symptoms: Phases appear clickable but selectedPhases count remains 0, 'No phases selected' message persists

ui_bugs.issue: Button remains disabled even when target is entered (due to phase selection bug)

passed_tests: API Health Check - v3.1.0 with tactical_engine features
Service attack strategies (ssh, http, smb, rdp, mysql)
Vulnerability exploit mappings (sql injection, xss, lfi, etc.)
Tab navigation (Kill Chain, Attack Tree, MSF, AI, History)
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix phase selection bug in Kill Chain component. The onClick handler for phase selection is not updating the selectedPhases state, preventing users from starting scans. Check togglePhase function and ensure state updates are working correctly.
